stageSteps.name: Check_for_Valid_Pro_Forma_Record
stageSteps.label: Check for Valid Pro Forma Record

stageSteps.name: Send_Approval_to_VP_BD_Finance
stageSteps.label: Send Approval to VP BD Finance

stageSteps.name: Post_Approval_Step
stageSteps.entryConditionLogic: (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4) AND ((NOT 5) OR (5 AND 6)) AND ((NOT 7) OR (7 AND 8))
stageSteps.label: Post Approval Step

stageSteps.name: Mark_In_Approval_Process_Flag_as_false
stageSteps.label: Mark In Approval Process Flag as false

textTemplates.name: var_ApprovalEmailBody
textTemplates.text:
Hello,

A new Pro Forma Model has been submitted for your review and approval. Please see the details below.

Pro Forma Model Summary:

  • Is this a current client?: {!$Record.Current_Client__c}
  • Encounter Level Data Provided?: {!$Record.Encounter_Level_Data__c}
  • Unique Med Mal Limits?: {!$Record.Med_Mal_Limits_Unique__c}
  • Gross Margin [$] : {!$Record.Gross_Margin__c}
  • Gross Margin Percentage [%]: {!$Record.Gross_Margin_Percent__c}
  • At Risk of Margin [%]: {!$Record.At_Risk_of_Margin__c}
  • Operating in a new state?: {!$Record.New_State__c}
  • Financial Contract Type: {!$Record.Financial_Contract_Type__c}
  • Compensation Buffer [%]: {!$Record.Compensation_Buffer__c}
  • Physician Compensation: {!$Record.Physician_Comp_Above_Below_State_Avg__c}
  • Comments: {!$Record.Comments__c}

Please review the Pro Forma Model details and approve or reject this request.

Thank you.
